videos.headline: Kyron Drones puts VT on top
videos.description: Kyron Drones throws an 11-yard touchdown pass to Marcellous Hawkins for Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyron Drones puts VT on top) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Terion Stewart rips an 85-yard rush
videos.description: Terion Stewart puts Virginia Tech in scoring position with an 85-yard run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Terion Stewart rips an 85-yard rush) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Scott sneaks in for NC State TD
videos.description: Jayden Scott rushes one yard to give NC State a lead over Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Scott sneaks in for NC State TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: VT converts on third-down in spectacular fashion
videos.description: Kyron Drones escapes pressure to find Benji Gosnell for a 14-yard catch for Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (VT converts on third-down in spectacular fashion) 2025/09/27 ESHEET
